audience_policies.source_phrase: Pass admits up to 6 guests to Davis Farmland at the gate with a savings of $10 OFF per ticket. Dates & rates change with the season. Visit DavisFarmland.com for up to date info. Adults MUST be accompanied by at least one child 12 years or younger.
